title: rhamnus alpina var. hydriensis
intro: Rhamnus alpina var. hydriensis, also known as the alpine buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Greece and the Balkans. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhamnus alpina var. hydriensis include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
